title: Summary: Turn 28
content: Pueblo is a CLI-first + Electron desktop code agent framework (TypeScript, Node.js 22) with a layered architecture: input routing → command dispatch/agent execution → LLM provider adapters → tool calls → SQLite persistence, plus a Pepe semantic memory system (embedding + retrieval). Key src/ modules: agent/, cli/, commands/, desktop/ (main/preload/renderer), memory/, persistence/, providers/, sessions/, tools/.
